summary: Confirmed insider IP theft. Memory (captured 2020-11-16, 3 days post-incident) showed no resident malware (2186 procs, 103 baseline/volume anomalies, no injected PE) — so the agent pivoted to disk. LNK artifacts show Stark Research Labs project files copied to an external F: USB drive on 2020-11-13, and Chrome history shows a search for the SDelete secure-deletion tool (anti-forensics intent). This is the Nov-13 unauthorized access + exfiltration the case concerns.

evidence: get_process_list: 103 flags are Teams/svchost volume anomalies, no injected PE; capture is post-incident

hypotheses.statement: Sensitive SRL files were exfiltrated to removable media on 2020-11-13

attack_chain: 2020-11-13 ~05:00 UTC — SRL project files (Megaforce, Blue Thunder, Wolves Lair) accessed from external F: drive (LNK targets)
2020-11-13/14 — Chrome search for SDelete secure-deletion tool (anti-forensics, T1070.004)
2020-11-16 02:32 UTC — memory captured (post-incident); RDP brute force from external IPs also present (separate, later activity)
mitre_techniques: T1110/T1021.001 (RDP brute force — separate Nov-16 activity)
